tests.name: test_assets_load_on_github_pages
tests.description: All CSS and JS files must load on production site

steps.name: Attach network response monitor for 404s
Navigate to production URL and wait for network idle
Filter asset 404s from captured responses
Verify navigation landmark exists and is visible
steps.code:
nav = deploy_page.get_by_role("navigation")
nav_count = nav.count()
assert nav_count > 0, Msg.DEPLOY_NAV_NOT_FOUND.format(
    url=_PAGES_URL, count=nav_count,
)
assert nav.is_visible(), Msg.DEPLOY_NAV_HIDDEN.format(
    count=nav_count, url=_PAGES_URL,
)

steps.name: Verify h1 heading exists with content
steps.code:
h1 = deploy_page.get_by_role("heading", level=1)
h1_count = h1.count()
assert h1_count == 1, Msg.DEPLOY_H1_WRONG_COUNT.format(
    actual=h1_count, url=_PAGES_URL,
)
h1_text = h1.inner_text()
assert h1_text.strip(), Msg.DEPLOY_H1_EMPTY.format(url=_PAGES_URL)

Assert title contains role 'Automation'
steps.code:

    Msg.TITLE_MISSING_ROLE.format(
        expected=PAGE_TITLE.CONTAINS_ROLE, actual=title,

steps.name: Assert title contains type 'Engineer'

        expected=PAGE_TITLE.CONTAINS_TYPE, actual=title,

tests.name: test_test_results_section_renders
tests.description: Test results section must show loaded data from test_report.json

steps.name: Locate the test results section
steps.code:
section = page.locator("#test-results")
assert section.is_visible(), (
    "Test results section #test-results is not visible on page"
)

steps.name: Wait for test data to load from test_report.json
Verify summary cards show numeric values
steps.code:
summary_cards = section.locator(
    "[class*='summary'], [class*='stat'], [class*='count']"
)
card_count = summary_cards.count()
section_text = section.inner_text()
has_numbers = any(
    char.isdigit() for char in section_text
)
assert has_numbers, (
    f"Test results section has no numeric values. "
    f"Section text: '{section_text[:200]}'. "
    f"Likely test_report.json failed to load."
)

steps.name: Verify at least one test row is rendered
Take screenshot showing test results
steps.code:
from datetime import datetime
ts = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
page.screenshot(
    path=f"screenshots/assert_test_results_{ts}.png",
    full_page=False
)

tests.name: test_mobile_viewport_no_horizontal_scroll
tests.description: No horizontal overflow at 390x844 mobile viewport

steps.name: Wait for mobile page content to be ready
Assert scroll_w <= viewport_w (no overflow)
steps.code:
assert scroll_w <= viewport_w, \
    Msg.HORIZONTAL_OVERFLOW.format(
        scroll_w=scroll_w, viewport_w=viewport_w,
    )

Measure load time via Navigation Timing API

tests.name: test_images_have_alt_text
tests.description: Every image must have descriptive alt text

steps.name: Evaluate all images via JavaScript
steps.code:
violations: list[dict] = page.evaluate("""
    () => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('img'))
        .filter(img =>
            img.getAttribute('aria-hidden') !== 'true'
            && (!img.alt || img.alt.trim() === '')
        )
        .map((img, i) => ({
            index: i,
            src: (img.src || '').slice(0, 80)
        }))
""")

steps.name: Take screenshot at assertion point
steps.code:
from datetime import datetime
ts = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
page.screenshot(
    path=f"screenshots/assert_images_alt_{ts}.png",
    full_page=False
)

steps.name: Verify no images are missing alt text
steps.code:
assert violations == [], (
    f"Found {len(violations)} image(s) without alt text: "
    + str(violations)
)

tests.name: test_headings_hierarchy_is_correct
tests.description: Heading levels must follow correct order without gaps

steps.name: Collect all heading elements and their tag names
steps.code:
headings = portfolio.all_headings.all()
tags = [h.evaluate("el => el.tagName.toLowerCase()") for h in headings]

steps.name: Assert exactly 1 h1 heading exists
steps.code:
h1_count = tags.count("h1")
assert h1_count == COUNTS.H1_HEADINGS, Msg.WRONG_H1_COUNT.format(
    expected=COUNTS.H1_HEADINGS, actual=h1_count,
)

steps.name: Assert h1 appears before first h2
steps.code:
h1_idx = tags.index("h1")
h2_indices = [i for i, t in enumerate(tags) if t == "h2"]
if h2_indices:
    assert h1_idx < h2_indices[0], Msg.H1_NOT_FIRST

steps.name: Assert no heading levels are skipped
